examples:
Command Example
!symantec-dlp-get-incident-details incident_id=2222 custom_attributes="specific attributes
" custom_data=ca1,ca2,ca3
Context Example
"SymantecDLP.Incident: {
'ID': 2222,
'LongID': 2222,
'StatusCode': 'SUCCESS',

!symantec-dlp-get-incident-details incident_id=2222 custom_attributes="specific attributes
" custom_data=ca1,ca2,ca3
Context Example
"SymantecDLP.Incident: {
'ID': 2222,
'LongID': 2222,
'StatusCode': 'SUCCESS',
'CreationDate': '2018-08-01T11:50:16',
name: symantec-dlp-get-incident-details

outputs.description: The ID of the incident. SymantecDLP.Incident.LongID The long ID of the incident.
outputs.name: SymantecDLP.Incident.ID

outputs.description: The status code of the incident. SymantecDLP.Incident.CreationDate Date
outputs.name: SymantecDLP.Incident.StatusCode

outputs.description: SymantecDLP.Incident.DetectionDate Date The detection date of the incident.
outputs.name: The creation date of the incident.

outputs.description: The severity of the incident. SymantecDLP.Incident.MessageSource The localized label that corresponds to the Symantec DLP product that generated the incident.
outputs.name: SymantecDLP.Incident.Severity

outputs.description: Indicates the Symantec DLP product that generated the incident. Can be: NETWORK, DISCOVER, ENDPOINT, DIM, DAR. SymantecDLP.Incident.MessageType Indicates the Symantec DLP product component that generated the incident.
outputs.name: SymantecDLP.Incident.MessageSourceType

outputs.description: The ID of the Message Type. SymantecDLP.Incident.Policy.Name The name of the policy.
outputs.name: SymantecDLP.Incident.MessageTypeID

outputs.description: The version of the policy. SymantecDLP.Incident.Policy.Label The label of the policy.
outputs.name: SymantecDLP.Incident.Policy.Version

outputs.description: The ID of the policy. SymantecDLP.Incident.BlockedStatus Indicates whether the message was blocked or not.
outputs.name: SymantecDLP.Incident.Policy.ID

outputs.description: Indicates the number of detection rule matches in the incident. SymantecDLP.Incident.RuleViolationCount Indicates the number of policy rules that were violated.
outputs.name: SymantecDLP.Incident.MatchCount

outputs.description: The name of the detection server that created the incident. SymantecDLP.Incident.DataOwner.Name The name of the data owner.
outputs.name: SymantecDLP.Incident.DetectionServer

outputs.description: The email of the data owner. SymantecDLP.Incident.EventDate Date
outputs.name: SymantecDLP.Incident.DataOwner.Email

outputs.description: SymantecDLP.Incident.ViolatedPolicyRule.Name The name of the rule within the policy that the message violated. SymantecDLP.Incident.ViolatedPolicyRule.ID
outputs.name: The date and time at which the violation event occurred.

outputs.description: The ID of the rule within the policy that the message violated. SymantecDLP.Incident.OtherViolatedPolicy.Name The name of any additional policies that the message violated.
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: The version of any additional policies that the message violated. SymantecDLP.Incident.OtherViolatedPolicy.Label The label of any additional policies that the message violated.
outputs.name: SymantecDLP.Incident.OtherViolatedPolicy.Version

outputs.description: The ID of any additional policies that the message violated. SymantecDLP.Incident.CustomAttribute.Name The custom attribute name.
outputs.name: SymantecDLP.Incident.OtherViolatedPolicy.ID
